translation: Say, “O you who suppress the Truth!”
“I worship not that which you worship,”
“And you worship not Him Whom I worship,”
“And I shall worship not that which you worship,”
“And you worship not Him Whom I worship.”
“For you your way of life and for me, mine.”
notes: It was indeed a very fair offer to the kaafiroon. The Prophet preached to them the Islamic way of life. If they accepted it, well and good; and if they did not, well, there was no compulsion. It was left for Allah to deal with their disbelief.
